name: Generate leads with Google Maps
description: Automated lead generation pipeline: searches for businesses using Exa, scrapes their websites with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract contact information, and saves structured leads to a new Google Sheets spreadsheet.

searchQuery.description: Business type and location to search for (e.g. 'plumbers in Austin TX', 'dentists in Chicago')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of businesses to find (default 10)

steps.name: Extract unique URLs from search results
Scrape business websites for contact info
Compile scraped data for AI extraction

code.source:
const prompt = `You are a lead generation specialist. Extract business contact information from the following scraped websites.

SEARCH QUERY: ${$.input.searchQuery}

SCRAPED WEBSITE DATA:
${$.steps.compileScrapedData.output.sitesText}

For each business found, extract:
- Business name
- Phone number (if available)
- Email address (if available)
- Physical address (if available)
- Website URL
- Business type/category
- Brief description (1 sentence)

Return ONLY valid JSON — an array of objects:
[
  {
    "business_name": "...",
    "phone": "...",
    "email": "...",
    "address": "...",
    "website": "...",
    "category": "...",
    "description": "..."
  }
]

If a field is not found, use empty string. Return at least the business name and website for every site.`;
return { prompt };

steps.name: Run Claude AI to extract contacts
Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet for leads
